scripts.ci: npm run check:cases && npm run check:esm && npm test
scripts.eval:breakthrough: node scripts/copy-skill.js && CASE_DIR=${CASE_DIR:-cases_holdout} PRIMARY_CONDITION=${PRIMARY_CONDITION:-production_constraint_prompt} EVAL_CONDITIONS=${EVAL_CONDITIONS:-baseline,careful_control,constraint_axis_prompting,style_matched_baseline,skill,production_constraint_prompt} PAIRWISE_COMPARISONS=${PAIRWISE_COMPARISONS:-production_constraint_prompt:baseline,production_constraint_prompt:careful_control,production_constraint_prompt:constraint_axis_prompting,production_constraint_prompt:style_matched_baseline,production_constraint_prompt:skill} TRIALS=${TRIALS:-3} node scripts/run-eval.js
